mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrders, COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) AS totalRevenue FROM orders

SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, SUM(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantitySold FROM order_item oi JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY totalQuantitySold DESC LIMIT #{limit}
